scores.correctness_notes: Core concept is correct but: (1) priority order table is incomplete — omits ErrorStatus (highest priority per gold standard); (2) omits the important rule that calling add_status() with ErrorStatus or UnknownStatus is an error; (3) the collect_app_status handler includes a redundant is_leader() guard that contradicts the gold standard's statement that it only fires on the leader.
scores.hallucination_notes: charm.on.observe(...) is incorrect API — the 'on' object (BoundEvents) does not have an observe() method. The correct call is charm.framework.observe(...) or self.framework.observe(...). This appears twice in the DatabaseComponent.__init__ constructor.
